trending_videos.title: GUILTY GEAR -STRIVE- Season Pass 5 Playable Character #2 [Robo-Ky] Trailer
trending_videos.description:
■Official website: https://www.guiltygear.com/ggst/en/
GUILTY GEAR : the next entry to the series

■GUILTY GEAR Official X
https://x.com/GUILTYGEAR_PR

■The fate of the universe will be determined...
The story of Guilty Gear, spanning over 25 years, will finally come to a conclusion in “GUILTY GEAR -STRIVE-." The trials and tribulations of the series’ heroes and villains will finally be resolved. Discover the astonishing truth awaiting at the end of all things.

Check out the play style of the second character in Season Pass 5, Robo-Ky, in this trailer.

■Buy now!
https://www.guiltygear.com/ggst/en/buynow/

© ARC SYSTEM WORKS

#GGST #GUILTYGEAR #RoboKy

trending_videos.title: Invincible VS - DLC 1 Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
trending_videos.description:
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/invincible-vs/

The battle for Season One begins June 30th!

Fight with Universa and The Immortal. Flex new premium and earnable skins. Play Endless Arcade mode, and much more.

Don't get too comfortable though, Angstrom Levy is waiting...

The Immortal & Universa join Invincible VS on June 30th as the first two fighters of the Year 1 Character Pass. Come to our booth at Evo France and experience the 3rd DLC fighter: Angstrom Levy.

#ps5 #ps5games #invinciblevs 

Rated Mature

trending_videos.title: Transcendence Trailer - "Sudden Snow" | Genshin Impact #GenshinImpact #GenshinSnezhnaya
trending_videos.description:
Sleep well, sleep well, children of this world...
Fear neither the dark nor the deathly stillness,
For the divine has promised you unconditional love.
‌
Awaken, awaken, O storm with neither root nor source!
If blessings are so generous, so selfless,
Then why has mercy never reached the winter?
